message:
Prevent operator construction when Describer validation fails

Make ValidateCtx inherit from diagnostic_handler to track emitted
errors. After running custom validation in GenericIr::substitute,
check if any errors were emitted and return failure if so.

This ensures operators are not constructed when validation fails,
allowing operators to use TENZIR_ASSERT on validated fields instead
of defensive value_or() fallbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
